# 001 — Beach House Café Website

## Overview
Single-page Next.js 14 website for "The Beach House Café" with 6 animated sections,
a looping beach video background, mobile-first responsive design, and a contact form
that sends email via Resend.

## Tech Stack
- Next.js 14 (App Router, TypeScript)
- Tailwind CSS v3
- Framer Motion
- Resend (email)
- React Hook Form + Zod

## Brand Colors
- Primary (ocean blue):  #4F8FA8
- Secondary (sandy gold): #C9A46A
- Background (cream):    #F5F1E8
- Dark (deep navy):      #1E3A4A

## Sections
1. Hero       — full-screen beach video, animated headline, CTA buttons
2. Menu       — category tabs, animated food/drink cards
3. Gallery    — masonry grid, lightbox
4. About      — animated counters, parallax image
5. Reviews    — swipeable testimonial carousel
6. Contact    — validated form → email via Resend + Google Maps

## Coding Conventions
- No semicolons in JS/TS unless necessary
- Single quotes in JS/TS
- Double quotes in HTML attributes
- Event handlers named onSomething
